# PayGate

> PayGate is an open-source **x402 paywall** for AI agent traffic. It lets any
> API owner monetise endpoints for machine-to-machine consumers with a single
> config file: set a price per call in USDC, and any x402-capable agent on
> Base or Solana can discover, pay, and consume the API instantly.
>
> Think of it as Stripe Checkout, but for machine-to-machine API payments.

## Primary surfaces

- [README](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/README.md): project overview, quickstart, chain matrix.
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/AGENTS.md): how AI coding agents should operate inside the repo.
- [Architecture](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): components, data flow, deployment topologies.
- [Payment flow](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/payment-flow.md): x402 handshake explained end-to-end.
- [Security](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/security.md): threat model, invariants, audit plan.
- [Compliance](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/compliance.md): OFAC, MiCA, GDPR, SOC 2 evidence.

## Chains

- [Base integration](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/base.md): EIP-3009 transfer authorisation, permit2, USDC verification, reorg handling.
- [Solana integration](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/solana.md): SPL verification, priority fees, finality, Address Lookup Tables.

## Operations

- [Scaling](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/scaling.md): horizontal scale, Redis sharding, RPC failover, read replicas.
- [Monitoring](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/monitoring.md): OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, SLOs, runbooks.
- [Error handling](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/error-handling.md): error taxonomy + retry policies.
- [Deployment](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/deployment.md): Fly, Render, Railway, ECS, Kubernetes.

## SDK reference

- [Node SDK (npm: @paygate/node)](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/packages/paygate-node/README.md): TypeScript SDK + proxy + CLI.
- [Python SDK (PyPI: paygate)](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/packages/paygate-python/README.md): Python SDK + proxy + CLI.
- [API reference](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/api-reference.md): REST, WebSocket, CLI.

## Examples

- [Express + PayGate](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/tree/main/examples/express-api)
- [FastAPI + PayGate](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/tree/main/examples/fastapi-api)
- [Next.js App Router + PayGate](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/tree/main/examples/nextjs-api)
- [Hono + PayGate](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/tree/main/examples/hono-api)
- [Solana RPC gateway](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/tree/main/examples/solana-rpc-gateway)
- [Django + DRF](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/tree/main/examples/django-drf)

## Machine-readable knowledge dump

- [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/dhruvalgupta2003/paygate/blob/main/docs/llms-full.txt): flattened docs for retrieval.
